content.en:
After another period of time, Ye Tian finally mastered the changes of the Dao of Time again and obtained the imprint of the changes of the Dao of Time.

In this way, every long period of time, Ye Tian would master more than a billion kinds of Dao changes, and his own strength was constantly improving.

However, he was still in the Ten Realms Realm Master.

Before you know it, hundreds of millions of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's perfect body finally improved again, and he was promoted from the Xiaocheng realm to the Dacheng realm.

The perfect body of the Dacheng realm is much stronger than the perfect body of the Xiaocheng realm!

Originally, Ye Tian wanted to cultivate the perfect body to the Dacheng realm, and he didn't know how many long years it would take, and it was almost difficult to calculate, but now that he had obtained the perfection-level ancestral endowment of devouring the body, he could easily cultivate the perfect body to the Dacheng realm.

And after the perfect body reached the realm of Dacheng, Ye Tian's strength could be said to have skyrocketed.

In the dark, Ye Tian touched the boundary of the Ten Realms, but he still hadn't reached it yet, which meant that he could still improve his strength.

However, his strength is much stronger now than in the past.

If compared to the Black Decay Master, he can shatter the body of the Black Decay Controller and kill the Black Decay Controller with a single blow, this is his current strength.

......

Wanyuan Mountain.

Ye Tian came here, mainly because the Ten Elements Ancestor informed Ye Tian to come here, mainly because he wanted to know about Ye Tian's progress.

And after Ye Tian came, the Ten Elements Ancestor looked at it for a moment or two, but was secretly surprised.

Although Ye Tian was still at the Ten Realms level controller, he felt that Ye Tian's aura was terrifying, as if he was not much weaker than him.

Is this still a Ten Realms level master?

"Apprentice, my current strength surprises me a little, are you interested in fighting with your teacher?"

Ten Elements of Ancestral Path.

"Fighting with Shizun?"

Ye Tian was stunned, and then nodded slightly, "That disciple is offended, so he will fight with the master." "

Somewhere in the time and space of Wanyuan Mountain, this place is enough to carry the battle of the level of the Ten Elements Ancestor.

Ye Tian and the Ten Elements Ancestor came here.

"Apprentice, let's shoot!"

Ten Elements of Ancestral Path.

He was very confident in his own strength, and felt that no matter how strong Ye Tian was, he would not be able to threaten him.

However, when Ye Tian made a move, the Ten Elements Ancestor's face changed, and he was quite shocked in his heart.

"Perfect Body!"

"Swallow the Sky Body!"

Ye Tian's combat power was at full strength, after all, he was facing his own master, the Ten Elements Ancestor, a great existence that surpassed the Ten Realms-level Controllers, and he didn't know how long he had advanced at the level of Transcending the Ten Realm-level Masters, so he still didn't know what his combat power was.

Therefore, he naturally will not keep his hands and compete with his master with the strongest combat power.

"Empty eyes!"

This secret technique was cast, but it had no effect on his master.

He is not surprised by this.

After all, the Void Eye is only one of the secret techniques of the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon Clan, and it has not surpassed the Ten Realms at all, so it naturally threatens the Ten Elements Ancestor.

"Ten Thousand Blades!"

Ye Tian held the Will Blade in his hand and slashed towards the Ten Elements Ancestor.

With a Dacheng-level perfect body and a heaven-devouring battle body, the ten thousand blades that were slashed out were simply terrifying, and in terms of attack power alone, they had already reached the level of the Ten Elements Ancestor.

"Shield of the Ten Directions!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor was protected by a thin shield of light, and he forcibly withstood the blow of the Ten Thousand Dao Blades.

However, the Ten Elements Ancestor was still knocked away, and although he was not injured, it was enough to prove how powerful Ye Tian's attack power was.

Click!!

With a crisp sound, the shield of the ten directions shattered directly.

"Shattered my shield of the ten directions!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor was surprised.

His Ten Directions Shield is also a perfect control technique that surpasses the top Origin Control Technique, even if a group of Ten Realm-level Masters attack his Ten Directions Shield, they can't break the Ten Directions Shield at all.

Now, he was shattered by his disciple Ye Tian's blow.

"Shadow of the Ten Directions!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor used another of his perfect control techniques and began to get serious.

Ten figures appeared in the void, each of which possessed combat power comparable to that of the main body.

Bang!!!!

Time and space are shattered, and all things are silent.

Ye Tian and the Ten Elements Ancestors continued to fight, destroying the time and space here again and again.

Soon, Ye Tian was completely suppressed by the Ten Elements Ancestor.

The main reason is that Ye Tian can't beat the Ten Elements Ancestor at all, and occasionally severely hurts a shadow of the Ten Elements Ancestor, but it doesn't help at all.

But.

Ye Tian's defense is indeed very strong, with the Dacheng-level perfect body and the Heaven Devouring Battle Body, the defense power has surpassed the Ten Elements Ancestor, so no matter how much the Ten Elements Ancestor's attack hits Ye Tian's body, there is no way to break Ye Tian's defense.

Therefore, the Ten Elements Ancestor could at most lightly injure Ye Tian, and he could not seriously damage Ye Tian.

Soon.

Ye Tian still admitted defeat.

Without him, because he can't hurt the Ten Elements Ancestor, although it is difficult for the Ten Elements Ancestor to hurt him, but if he continues to fight for a long time, he will be the one who will be defeated in the end.

Therefore, there is no need for him to deliberately stick to it, there is no point.

"Master, I admit defeat!"

Ye Tian said.

Shixing Ancestor said: "Let's count it as a draw, I can't hurt you hard, if you really want to leave, I can't stop you." I didn't expect that you were only a Ten Realms level master, and you would have been raised to such an extent. "

"The disciple is just lucky!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

Afterwards, the master and apprentice sat down to chat.

"Master, although my strength has been improving, I don't know much about the path above the Ten Realms level, so I want to ask Master, how to improve my strength after surpassing the Ten Realms level?"

Ye Tian asked.

At this time, the Ten Elements Ancestor said solemnly: "Your current strength is not weaker than mine, but you are also qualified to understand the things above the Ten Realms level controllers, several of us who have surpassed the Ten Realms level have been trying to create the next realm, and we have also explored countless years, and we have also missed many paths. At present, there are several ways to continuously improve strength, such as breaking the shackles, which is a newly discovered path. The second is to grasp the changes of a seed path to a billion kinds and form an imprint, and you should also know something. The second is to create the perfect mastery technique to improve your strength. Of course, these are conventional means of improving our strength, and they will not help us to carve out the next realm. According to our calculations, if we want to open up the next realm, we still have to control the body and will. In other words, we must break the shackles of the primordial body of control and the will of the Transfiguration Realm, and transcend this realm in order to reach the next realm. "

"Beyond the Will of the Transfiguration Realm and the Primordial Control Body, has anyone done it so far?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Ten Elements Ancestor shook his head, "No one has done it yet, but the most likely person is the Primordial Controller, his strength was the strongest among us at the beginning, if he was still alive, he might have reached this level." But only if you break through both, you can hope to reach the next realm, otherwise it can still only be regarded as a half-step breakthrough. "

Ye Tian was thoughtful.

Subsequently, Ye Tian exchanged his cultivation experience with the Ten Elements Ancestor, and both of them gained something.

Soon after, Ye Tian left and went back to continue his cultivation.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of millions of years have passed.

this day.

A figure continued to cross time and space, and came to the Origin Realm Sea.
